settings.title: Hospitality
settings.text: Turn every stay into a 5 stars with BEDGEAR®

settings.heading: Give Your Guests the Gift of Better Sleep

settings.text: Increase guest satisfaction, improve reviews, and ensure long-lasting comfort with BEDGEAR performance bedding.

settings.heading: Cooling Technology
settings.text: Advanced airflow and temperature-regulating materials help guests stay cool and comfortable all night long, reducing overheating for more restful sleep.

settings.heading: Hygienic & Durable
settings.text: Designed for high-turnover environments with easy-care, long-lasting materials that maintain cleanliness, comfort, and performance over time.

settings.heading: Performance Brand
settings.text: Engineered to support deep, restorative sleep, helping travelers wake up refreshed, recharged, and ready for the day ahead.

settings.heading: Personalized Sleep Experience
settings.text: From pillow preference to mattress support, BEDGEAR® gives guests the ability to customize their sleep setup—helping every traveler rest the way their body needs.

settings.title: Guest Experience Benefits
settings.caption: Today’s travelers expect more than just a bed. With BEDGEAR, you provide a performance-driven sleep environment that turns first-time visitors into repeat guests.

settings.heading: Long-lasting durability
settings.description: Built to withstand repeated use over time. Reduces replacement cycles and long-term costs.

settings.heading: Easy maintenance
settings.description: Designed for simple care routines. Wash, dry, and reset quickly between guest stays.

settings.heading: Scalable solutions
settings.description: Flexible product solutions that grow with your business. Built to scale across properties.

settings.heading: Fire-safety compliant
settings.description: Meets required fire-safety standards. Tested, certified, and ready for commercial use.

settings.heading: Better Sleep = Better Business
settings.title: Why BEDGEAR® Hospitality?
settings.caption: At BEDGEAR, we believe better sleep drives better revenue. Here’s the problem: Only 29% of hotel guests experience better-than-expected sleep during their stay.* Our high-tech Performance® Bedding is designed to exceed those expectations by delivering a cooler, cleaner, and more comfortable sleep experience—from lights-out to checkout. The result? Refreshing rest, rave reviews, and repeat bookings.

settings.title: Modularity Made to Last
settings.text: Our innovative modular design allows for easy maintenance and updates, right in the comfort of your home. With BEDGEAR®, longevity is built in. Our pillows and M3 mattresses are meticulously engineered to not only offer superior comfort but also a longer lifespan, reducing waste and the need for frequent replacements.

settings.title: Digital Asset Support
settings.text: Complete the in-room experience with co-branded materials that highlight our shared commitment to providing your guests with the best possible stay.

settings.title: Kick Back Program
settings.text: From website support to email marketing and social media content, our digital tools help you connect with new audiences, boost bookings, and elevate the guest experience.

settings.title: Digital Marketing Support
settings.text: You’ll receive a custom code for your property that rewards both your guests and your business. They get an exclusive discount on BEDGEAR products, and you earn a percentage of every sale—a win-win for everyone.

settings.title: With You Every Step of the Stay
settings.text: From marketing support to exclusive revenue-boosting programs, BEDGEAR provides everything you need to drive bookings, grow your brand, and create guest experiences they’ll never forget.

settings.title: Performance® Pillows
settings.text: Performance® Pillows adapt to every guest’s sleep style for their best night’s sleep—and feature removable, washable covers for effortless cleaning. LEARN MORE

settings.title: Performance® Mattresses
settings.text: Give your guests the ultimate sleep experience with Performance® Mattresses—designed for durability, unmatched airflow, and optimal comfort and support. LEARN MORE

settings.title: Performance® Sheets
settings.text: Treat your guests to the luxurious comfort of Performance® Sheets—Instant-cooling, moisture-wicking, ultra-breathable, and irresistibly soft. LEARN MORE

settings.title: Performance® Mattress Protectors
settings.text: Breathable, waterproof protection keeps your mattresses fresh and clean for every new guest—without ever sacrificing their comfort. LEARN MORE

settings.heading: Let guests personalize their sleep.
settings.text: We help hotels implement in-room or lobby-based pillow bars, offering multiple feels and heights so guests choose what’s right for them—reducing sleep complaints and increasing satisfaction scores.

settings.heading: A curated sleep experience for every guest.
settings.text: From multiple pillow sizes on each bed to cooling-focused assortments, we tailor bundles that work for high-turnover properties while keeping inventory and replacement simple.

settings.heading: A sleep system as premium as your brand.
settings.text: For luxury properties, our M3 system allows true customization—delivering a differentiated, high-touch sleep experience that becomes part of your brand story.

settings.title: Hospitality Solutions That Adapt to Your Property
settings.caption: From boutique stays to luxury resorts, BEDGEAR partners with hospitality brands in different ways—because no two guest experiences (or operations) are the same.

settings.title: Unmatched Airflow
settings.text: Advanced fabric technologies and fill materials ensure maximum breathability, helping your guests regulate body temperature and stay comfortable all night.

settings.title: Personalized to Your Property
settings.text: A thoughtfully curated collection ensures your property has everything needed to deliver comfort and support for every guest, every night.

settings.title: Eco-Friendly
settings.text: Designed with sustainability in mind, our eco-friendly designs use upcycled materials and modular components to reduce landfill waste and help your property offer a greener stay for every guest.
